en: [u][color=red]Defense Phase[/color] - Match the attack color on the beat: [color=blue]%s[/color] / [color=yellow]%s[/color] / [color=green]%s[/color].[/u]
zh: [u][color=red]防御阶段[/color] - 跟着节拍匹配攻击颜色：[color=blue]%s[/color] / [color=yellow]%s[/color] / [color=green]%s[/color]。[/u]

en: The yellow bar is the boss's [color=yellow]shield.[/color] Successfully parrying an attack will reduce the shield; once the shield is empty it will be your attack phase!
zh: 黄色条是 Boss 的[color=yellow]护盾[/color]。成功招架攻击会削减护盾；护盾清空后就会进入你的攻击阶段！

en: The blue bar is your [color=yellow]rhythm energy[/color]. Making mistakes and using powerful attacks will drain some of your energy. [color=yellow]Be careful not to let it run out![/color]
zh: 蓝色条是你的[color=yellow]节奏能量[/color]。失误和使用强力攻击都会消耗能量。[color=yellow]别让它耗尽！[/color]

en: The red bar is the boss's [color=yellow]health[/color]. Attack the boss in attack phase and beat the boss!
zh: 红色条是 Boss 的[color=yellow]生命值[/color]。在攻击阶段攻击 Boss 并击败它！

en: [u][color=red]Attack Phase[/color] - Move with %s/%s and attack on the beat.[/u]\n[color=blue]Blue (%s) = Light[/color]  [color=yellow]Yellow (%s) = Heavy[/color]\n[color=red]Red (%s) = Boost[/color]  [color=green]Green (No Input) = Heal[/color]
zh: [u][color=red]攻击阶段[/color] - 用 %s/%s 移动，并跟着节拍攻击。[/u]\n[color=blue]蓝色（%s）= 轻击[/color]  [color=yellow]黄色（%s）= 重击[/color]\n[color=red]红色（%s）= 强化[/color]  [color=green]绿色（不输入）= 治疗[/color]

en: Adjust until the note crosses the line with the beat. %s/%s changes offset, %s returns.
zh: 调整到音符随节拍穿过判定线。%s/%s 调整延迟，%s 返回。

key: Shield down. The rhythm switches to ATTACK.
en: Shield down. The rhythm switches to ATTACK.
zh: 护盾已破。节奏切换到攻击。

key: Tap the light attack on the beat to build HEAT.
en: Tap the light attack on the beat to build HEAT.
zh: 跟着节拍使用轻击来积累热度。

key: Heavy attacks spend HEAT for big damage. Heal uses a beat to recover.
en: Heavy attacks spend HEAT for big damage. Heal uses a beat to recover.
zh: 重击会消耗热度造成高伤害。治疗会占用一个节拍来恢复。

key: Let our dissonant notes break the HARMONY!
en: Let our dissonant notes break the HARMONY!
zh: 让我们的不协和音打破和声！
激光？对我们来说很简单，对吧？
激光？对我们来说很简单，对吧？

key: Stronger ones coming up! Stay Focused!
en: Stronger ones coming up! Stay Focused!
zh: 更强的要来了！集中注意力！

key: There's a huge machine up ahead.
en: There's a huge machine up ahead.
zh: 前面有一台巨大的机器。
